candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Only a component of current assets, not the total.
Wrong section; non-current rather than current assets.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash line matching CHE.
Cash-like item, but 'Cash and cash equivalents' is the cleaner direct match.
Restricted cash should generally not be preferred for CHE when unrestricted cash and cash equivalents is reported.

variables.notes: Preferred exact cash and cash equivalents label on balance sheet.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Direct match for short-term debt/current borrowings and excludes lease liabilities.

variables.notes: Best direct financing-related current debt line; lease liabilities excluded.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Property, plant and equipment & right of use assets
candidates.why: Closest reported total PPE-type asset line, but it includes right-of-use assets in addition to PPE.
Standalone PPE label, but gross rather than total/net PPE and only available for some years.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease/ROU component only, not total PPE.

final_choice.row_label: Property, plant and equipment & right of use assets

variables.notes: R:c. No clean standalone total/net PPE line is consistently reported. Primary choice is the combined PPE plus right-of-use-assets line; secondary fallback is standalone gross PPE for periods where that is all that appears. Manual review recommended because right-of-use assets are bundled with PPE in the preferred label.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from (used in) operating activities
candidates.why: Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from (used in) operating activities

variables.notes: Selected direct operating cash flow total from the cash flow statement.
